mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan_products ( product_code, loan_type, company_code, company_name, product_name, join_way, loan_incidental_expense, early_repayment_fee, delinquency_rate, loan_limit, disclosure_start_day, disclosure_end_day, submitted_at, source, cached_at ) VALUES ( #{productCode}, #{loanType}, #{companyCode}, #{companyName}, #{productName}, #{joinWay}, #{loanIncidentalExpense}, #{earlyRepaymentFee}, #{delinquencyRate}, #{loanLimit}, #{disclosureStartDay}, #{disclosureEndDay}, #{submittedAt}, 'api', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE loan_type = VALUES(loan_type), company_code = VALUES(company_code), company_name = VALUES(company_name), product_name = VALUES(product_name), join_way = VALUES(join_way), loan_incidental_expense = VALUES(loan_incidental_expense), early_repayment_fee = VALUES(early_repayment_fee), delinquency_rate = VALUES(delinquency_rate), loan_limit = VALUES(loan_limit), disclosure_start_day = VALUES(disclosure_start_day), disclosure_end_day = VALUES(disclosure_end_day), submitted_at = VALUES(submitted_at), source = VALUES(source), cached_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO loan_rate_options ( product_code, repayment_type_code, repayment_type_name, rate_type_code, rate_type_name, mortgage_type_code, mortgage_type_name, rate_min, rate_max, rate_avg, cached_at ) VALUES ( #{productCode}, #{repaymentTypeCode}, #{repaymentTypeName}, #{rateTypeCode}, #{rateTypeName}, #{mortgageTypeCode}, #{mortgageTypeName}, #{rateMin}, #{rateMax}, #{rateAvg}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
